name: ISolid
summary: The ISolid interface represents a physical object in the model or a drawing created by a part instance. The solid instance can be used to query the actual geometry of the part.

methods.name: GetEdgeEnumerator
methods.summary: Returns a new edge enumerator in the current plane.

methods.name: GetFaceEnumerator
methods.summary: Returns a new face enumerator in the current plane.

properties.name: MaximumPoint
properties.summary: The maximum axis-aligned point of the solid in the current plane.

properties.name: MinimumPoint
properties.summary: The minimum axis-aligned point of the solid in the current plane.
